text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coming up in the latter half of February, we're
continuing our preparations for the Yayoi Sho in
the cold weather.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haah... Haah...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at Spe. That tire she's pulling is huge.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Recently, she's also been going out running
in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder why she's training like that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Suzuka! Hey!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, do you wanna do some partner running with
me after training today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka agrees, and the two of them go
partner running after our session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week chases after Silence Suzuka with all
her might, but Silence Suzuka manages to keep
ahead without breaking much of a sweat.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Guess I'm still not ready. I gotta work
harder...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Spe—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe! You out here partner running again?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hi, Sei. Yeah, just a little. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Again"?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Lately, she's been out here every day, partner
running with just about anyone, even though it's
after training hours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Don't burn yourself out, all right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks, I won't. See you later.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... All right, Suzuka. How about one more—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A-ahaha... I lost feeling in my legs.
choice_data_list:
Don't you think you've been working a little too
hard?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No! Not at all!
choice_data_list:
Proper rest is just as important as training, you
know.

Proper rest is just as important as training, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm sorry for worrying you...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why are you doing all of this?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You've been at it nonstop, running morning and
night, even after training...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So much so that you nearly fainted just now...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why are you pushing yourself like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a simple question, and although initially met
with pause, it doesn't seem as though she has
anything to hide.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanna make my dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Your dream?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah. But right now, I'm not good enough.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been trying so hard every day—to
get better!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Every day, bit by bit, I'm trying to get closer to
becoming the top Umamusume in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So, yeah... In a nutshell, that's it... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry, I was just a little surprised.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(That huge tire... Early morning running... Evening
partner running... How hard she was trying to
catch up to me...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (All to make her dream come true...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Are all the others like this too?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Silence Suzuka convinces the
exhausted Special Week to return to their dorm
before the sun fully sets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, there's a scrimmage on the
academy grounds.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, Silence Suzuka manages to take
first. However...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I couldn't catch up again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Why?! After everything... After all the work I've
done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the first time Silence Suzuka has found
herself surrounded by Umamusume devastated by
their failure to keep up with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But until now, she didn't pay them any mind—or
rather, she didn't even notice it happening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now, a change has begun to occur within her.
